description: Composition Blue skinny jeans with washed look made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back, comfortable waistband with loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, and a button and zipper closure on the front Fitting Low rise Skinny Fit Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with the washed look adds unique styling to this blue skinny jeans from spykar, while the cotton and spandex fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accomodate your body movements. Team it with t-shirts and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
